scripts.dev:web: concurrently -k -n core,protocol,web -c blue,cyan,magenta "pnpm --filter @catan/core dev" "pnpm --filter @catan/protocol dev" "pnpm --filter @catan/web dev"
scripts.dev:server: concurrently -k -n core,protocol,server -c blue,cyan,green "pnpm --filter @catan/core dev" "pnpm --filter @catan/protocol dev" "pnpm --filter @catan/server dev"
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n core,protocol,server,web -c blue,cyan,green,magenta "pnpm --filter @catan/core dev" "pnpm --filter @catan/protocol dev" "pnpm --filter @catan/server dev" "pnpm --filter @catan/web dev"
